summary: Completed frontend testing of buyer/dealer/admin secondary pages. All pages render correctly with proper loading, empty, and error states. Auth-protected pages correctly redirect to sign-in.

homepage.details: Homepage renders correctly with AutoLenis branding, CTAs, and buyer console preview

signin_page.details: Sign-in page renders with email/password inputs and sign-in button

buyer_dashboard.details: Buyer dashboard loads after login with proper navigation and buyer journey display

buyer_deal_summary.details: Empty state renders correctly with data-testid='deal-summary-empty', shows 'No active deal' message with Browse Vehicles and Get Pre-Qualified CTAs

buyer_deal_contract.details: Empty state renders correctly with data-testid='contract-shield-empty', shows 'No active deal' message with Go to My Deal CTA

buyer_vehicle_requests.details: Page renders with empty state showing 'No vehicle requests yet' and Create Your First Request CTA

buyer_auctions.details: Page renders with empty state showing 'No auctions yet'

buyer_referral.details: Page renders with referral link section and stats (0 Total Referrals, 0 Completed, $0 Total Earned)

dealer_deals_detail.details: Auth redirect works - redirects to /auth/signin when accessed without dealer auth

admin_deals_detail.details: Auth redirect works - redirects to /admin/sign-in when accessed without admin auth

admin_payouts_detail.details: Auth redirect works - redirects to /admin/sign-in when accessed without admin auth

dealer_requests_detail.details: Auth redirect works - redirects to /auth/signin when accessed without dealer auth

context_for_next_testing_agent: All buyer portal pages tested with buyer account. Dealer and admin pages require separate auth (dealer/admin accounts). The app uses Supabase auth with separate admin sign-in at /admin/sign-in. All secondary pages have proper loading, empty, and error states with data-testid attributes for testing.
